title: Collection Management Analysis
public_claim: A collection-management analysis page for turning intelligence needs into collection priorities.
distinctive_mechanism: It links requirements, priority intelligence requirements, source fit, collection gaps, reporting value, and feedback so collection is judged by decision utility rather than activity volume.
use_value: It shows how an intelligence question becomes a managed collection problem with tradeoffs, not just a list of possible sources.
